privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated text injected into a DOCX file via setup scripts. It is confirmed that the input file is created at /home/ga/Documents/tod_ordinance_raw.docx and the expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/tod_ordinance_draft.docx. The required definitions (Transit Station Area, Active Floor Area, Pedestrian-Oriented Facade, Shared Parking), table headers (Use Category, Specific Use, Status, Standards), expected header text (DRAFT ORDINANCE - NOT ADOPTED), and the Legal page dimensions (8.5x14.0 inches) exactly match the task description instructions and the scoring logic in verifier.py.
